properties.name: encryption.secret
properties.description: Secret used to derive the AES-256-GCM key for encrypting stored AWS credentials. Set ENCRYPTION_SECRET env var in production.

properties.name: vision.ai.enabled
properties.description: Enable Claude Vision AI for receipt parsing. Requires vision.ai.api-key.

properties.name: vision.ai.api-key
properties.description: Anthropic API key for Claude Vision AI (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var).

properties.name: vision.ai.model
properties.description: Claude model ID to use for Vision AI parsing.

properties.name: vision.ai.max-pdf-pages
properties.description: Maximum number of PDF pages to process per upload.

properties.name: vision.ai.pdf-dpi
properties.description: DPI resolution for PDF-to-image conversion before Vision AI analysis.

properties.name: vision.ai.timeout-seconds
properties.description: HTTP timeout in seconds for calls to the Anthropic API.
